Tenders are hereby invited from capable and experienced service providers for the PROVISION OF HYGIENE SERVICE FOR A PERIOD OF THIRTY-SIX (36) MONTHS 

1.	Only tenderers who have provided the following mandatory information and documents to be used to evaluate the bidder's responsiveness will be considered for further evaluation on functionality;

1.1	Only service providers that are registered on the Central Supplier Database will be considered for the awarding of this request for quotations and a copy of CSD report not later than three months should be attached.

1.2	Price(s) quoted must be firm, VAT and other taxes inclusive, valid and fixed for the duration of the contract.

1.3	No tenders shall be considered from persons who are in the service of the state.

1.4	Service providers are required to fully complete the attached MBD forms and submit them together with their written tenders.

1.5	Attach a bank account confirmation letter with bank stamp not older than three months accompanied with an affidavit confirming the business bank account details - if the banking details are not verified on the CSD report.

1.6	Attach original certified copy of identity documents (ID) of company directors.

1.8	Valid SARS pin certificate must be attached.

1.10	Attach a verifiable copy of municipal accounts for both the bidder and company director/s not older than three months or a copy of a valid lease agreement.

•	 if aforementioned account information of the tenderer is not applicable, the tenderer must attach an original certified copy of proof of residence (PTO) issued by a relevant traditional authority or a copy of a valid lease agreement.

2.2	The 20 points will be allocated for the specified goals on a proportional or pro rata basis as follows:

Tenders are hereby invited from capable and experienced service providers for the PROVISION OF HYGIENE SERVICE FOR A PERIOD OF THIRTY-SIX (36) MONTHS 

1.	Only tenderers who have provided the following mandatory information and documents to be used to evaluate the bidder's responsiveness will be considered for further evaluation on functionality;

1.1	Only service providers that are registered on the Central Supplier Database will be considered for the awarding of this request for quotations and a copy of CSD report not later than three months should be attached.

1.2	Price(s) quoted must be firm, VAT and other taxes inclusive, valid and fixed for the duration of the contract.

1.3	No tenders shall be considered from persons who are in the service of the state.

1.4	Service providers are required to fully complete the attached MBD forms and submit them together with their written tenders.

1.5	Attach a bank account confirmation letter with bank stamp not older than three months accompanied with an affidavit confirming the business bank account details - if the banking details are not verified on the CSD report.

1.6	Attach original certified copy of identity documents (ID) of company directors.

1.7	Provide original certified copy of the company registration certificate issued by the Companies and Intellectual Property Commission (CIPC).

1.8	Valid SARS pin certificate must be attached.

1.9	Attach valid proof of COIDA registration with the Department of Employment and Labour.

1.10	Attach a verifiable copy of municipal accounts for both the bidder and company director/s not older than three months or a copy of a valid lease agreement.

2.2	The 20 points will be allocated for the specified goals on a proportional or pro rata basis as follows:
